title: Policy Change for Charging Your Club Account
excerpt: Since the club has been open, we have always offered the ability to charge any items purchased from the front desk to your club account. Due to a recent increase in disputed charges, we will now require that people sign for any purchases made to their club account, including interclub team food purchases. Thank you … Read more
content:
Since the club has been open, we have always offered the ability to charge any items purchased from the front desk to your club account. Due to a recent increase in disputed charges, we will now require that people sign for any purchases made to their club account, including interclub team food purchases.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation.
